greetingTemplate: Hello! I'm TracePilot. I search across your connected sources — {connectors}. What would you like to find?
noConnectorsMessage: Hello! I'm TracePilot. No sources are connected yet. Connect sources in settings to search your knowledge.

matchPatterns: ^(help(?: me)?|what are you|who are you|how do you work|how do i use (?:this|it)|what can you do|what do you do|what you do|what can u do|what do u do|what u do|what can you help me with|capabilities)[\s!.?]*$
rules.response: I search across your workspace docs — OKRs, architecture, meeting notes, Jira issues, and more. I answer questions and cite sources for every claim. What would you like to look up?
